hero.description: Invotrack is the all-in-one dashboard to manage your team, track client items, and generate invoices instantly. Data-driven decisions start here.

features.subTitle: Track clients, manage inventory, and generate invoices in a unified dashboard.

role.title: Role Management
role.desc: Assign precise access. Admins control settings, Managers handle stock, Viewers monitor data, and Deliver staff track shipments.

products.title: Products & Services
products.desc: Track inventory items and service offerings for every client. Never lose track of what you sold or what you owe.

invoicing.title: Smart Invoicing
invoicing.desc: Generate professional invoices with one click. Charts and stats track revenue automatically as invoices are paid.

stats.description: Invotrack doesn't just store data; it visualizes it. Get instant insights into best-selling items, client activity, and team performance.

contact.title: Get your business on Invotrack.
contact.description: Ready to organize your team? Create a business, invite admins and managers, and start delivering value to your clients today.

placeholders.message: I want to create a business...

success.title: Message Sent!
success.subtitle: We'll help you setup your business shortly.

footer.tagline: Track, Invoice, Deliver. Built for speed.
